questions.q: Which deployment strategy replaces all old pods with new ones simultaneously?
questions.explanation: The Recreate strategy terminates all existing pods before creating new ones, causing brief downtime. RollingUpdate gradually replaces pods to maintain availability.

questions.q: What command rolls back a deployment to its previous revision?
questions.explanation: kubectl rollout undo deployment/<name> reverts a deployment to the previous revision. You can specify --to-revision=N for a specific version.
